nasb.text: You shall not curse a deaf man, nor place a stumbling block before the blind, but you shall revere your God; I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall not curse the deaf or put a stumbling block before the blind, but you shall fear your God: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 不可咒罵聾子，也不可把絆腳石放在瞎子面前；卻要敬畏你的　神；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 不可咒骂聋子，也不可绊倒盲人，应当敬畏你们的上帝。我是耶和华。
